creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's not the ports that does it, it's bitlbee configure script. At least it says it on help:

--msn=0/1       Disable/enable MSN part                 default-on
--jabber=0/1    Disable/enable Jabber part              default-on
--oscar=0/1     Disable/enable Oscar part (ICQ, AIM)    default-on
--yahoo=0/1     Disable/enable Yahoo part               default-on
--twitter=0/1   Disable/enable Twitter part             1

--purple=0/1    Disable/enable libpurple support        0
                (automatically disables other protocol modules)
